home.title: STARY IKARUS
home.subtitle: THE OLD ICARUS
home.tagline:
Indie folk rock from Hamburg, sung in Russian.
A little folk, a little rock — thoughtful, metaphor-driven lyrics woven into melodies, trance-like rhythms, live sound and all that. After 15 years, we still haven't managed to pin down our genre — the songs keep shifting. Have a listen and decide for yourself. Your description might be the most accurate one yet.

about.title: About the Band
about.section1_text:
The band "Stary Ikarus" was founded in 2009 by guitarists Lev Marchenko and Evgeny Ostrovsky. The name did not come immediately — they wanted something mythical and ambiguous, yet at the same time familiar. The musicians recalled the myth of Icarus and decided that Icarus should continue to live and fly on — just a little older.
Over the past 15 years, the band has written a considerable number of diverse songs and played roughly the same number of concerts in Germany and Poland. The lineup has changed several times and currently consists of four musicians living in Hamburg.
about.section2_text: In our songs you will meet the most diverse characters, both people and animals (and even plants). The lyrical heroes are often troubled, so we warn in advance: an attentive and empathetic listener may change several perspectives during one concert and in the process either go crazy or achieve enlightenment. So far, no one has admitted it, but maybe it's out of modesty.
about.thank_you_title: Thank you for your interest in our music
about.thank_you_text: We look forward to sharing our art with you. Contact us for bookings, collaborations, or simply to discuss music.
about.former_member4: Eugen Ostrowsky (Willie Tobler) – Bass, Backing Vocals, Arrangements

music.album1_description: Our debut album, where we present our philosophy and sound.
music.album2_description: Our second album, exploring ancient myths in the context of the modern world.
music.album3_description: Our third album, completing the trilogy about Icarus's journey.
